Core_Validation_Method.reason: Results/Experimental Section describe recombinant enzyme assays, IC50 profiling, kinetic analysis, and nondenaturing PAGE with in-gel activity assay.

Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: Discussion explicitly says inhibitory activity on pea PBGS indicates wALADins might be potential herbicides.

Potential_Tradeoffs.reason: This exact plant-viability tradeoff is not directly tested in the Results; it is biologically plausible but not shown.

Other_Important_Info.reason: PsPBGS is placed in group X, and 5-ALA/Mg2+ are described as favoring active octamer and competing with inhibitory action.
